creator: matt@chronos.org.uk
text:
On Saturday 17 February 2007 16:11, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of comms/gpredict,
>
> Please note that PR ports/109258 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/109258

Thanks for the patch, happy to approve commit.
-- 
Matt Dawson.
